HGSS.669.0001:
You have got some nerve!
That’s awesome!\r
Just what I look for in a friend!\f
Whadda ya say we trade phone
numbers and be best friends? [0200,0000]
HGSS.669.0002:
All right!
Call me anytime!\f
About studying,
or about Pokémon,\r
or about a puzzle,\r
or about a Gym trick.\r
Even if you don’t run into anything\r
difficult, you can still give me a call!\f
I probably won’t know the answer, but
I’ll at least be able to listen!\f
’Cause we’re friends, you know?
HGSS.669.0004:
Oh, I see you’ve finally figured out
just how amazing I am?\f
Well, that’s to be expected. Let’s
trade phone numbers! [0200,0000]
HGSS.669.0005:
Well, I probably look a lot scarier than
I really am. Would you believe I’m really\r
a nice guy?\f
I won’t bite, so come and talk to me
in person!
HGSS.669.0006:
Yo, Teddy! You do a pretty good
impression of a motorcycle!\f
Next time you get a chance, you and I
should go riding and yell like\r
motorcycles. What do you say?\f
......Wait, who is this?\f
Oh no! Wrong number!
Sorry!
HGSS.669.0007:
My [0100,000A,0000] does a great job!
Anyway, its fighting spirit is different.\f
It’s never lost to any but the
strongest Pokémon!\f
What about your Pokémon?
Do they have any fighting spirit?\f
Never mind, you don’t have to answer.\f
I should know better than anyone just
how strong your Pokémon are!
HGSS.669.0008:
We’re a Biker gang, you know.
Got Pokémon with poison,\r
with spikes all over their bodies,\r
with fangs, and we even have some\r
Ghost-type Pokémon.\r
It’s all a big show of how tough we are.\f
But...\f
As for me...\f
I really like cute Pokémon like MARILL!
HGSS.669.0009:
So, yesterday I thought I was gonna
catch a [0100,000B,0000].\r
But that [0100,000B,0000], it took one look\r
at me and ran off!\f
It was totally rude!\f
You wouldn’t run away if you saw me,
would you...?
HGSS.669.0010:
Yo! So, I really wanna battle you again.
I mean, I am really itching to show off!\f
I’m always hanging out on
[0104,0003,0000]. Don’t get all\r
nervous and run away, got it?!
HGSS.669.0011:
What’s going on with you?
I’m waiting on [0104,0003,0000]!\f
You wouldn’t forget a promise you made
with a buddy, would you?
HGSS.669.0012:
You know, my bro Markey was talking
about this earlier... Have you thought\r
about joining our team at all?\f
We hang out on Cycling Road and make a
lot of noise, throw our garbage around,\r
then pick up our garbage and take it\r
home to throw away. It’s so much fun!
